name: universal_patterns
description: Anonymized cross-client patterns for future use. Aggregates debate outcomes to surface recurring decision trends.

columns.name: task_type
columns.description: Category of task (e.g. hiring, pricing, compliance)

columns.name: vote_split
columns.description: JSON representation of how votes typically split

columns.name: hitl_outcome
columns.description: How humans typically resolve this pattern

columns.name: occurrence_count
columns.description: Number of times this pattern has been observed
